howItWorks.intro: This snow load calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Snow Load
rules.explanation: Snow depth in feet times density per square foot.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much snow can a roof hold?
faq.a: Most roofs handle 20-40 psf. Check local building codes for your area.

faq.q: When should I remove roof snow?
faq.a: When accumulation exceeds 2 feet of settled snow or visible sagging.
